before: I want to be clear: the current approach is not working.
after: The current approach is not working.
trigger_regex: (?i)(i want to be clear|let me be direct|to be honest|frankly[,:])

description: Delete AI sentence-openers (Certainly, Absolutely, Of course, Indeed)
before: Certainly, the procurement data supports this conclusion.
after: The procurement data supports this conclusion.

description: Replace inflection-point clichés with the specific fact
before: We are at an inflection point in how Ventia manages its supply chain.
after: Supply chain costs have grown 18% in two years and action is overdue.
trigger_regex: (?i)(at an inflection point|this is a critical moment|watershed moment)

before: Overall, it appears that the vendor consolidation program has underdelivered.
after: The vendor consolidation program has underdelivered.
trigger_regex: (?i)(overall, it appears that|it seems that|one could argue)

description: Flatten tricolon quality lists to one direct claim
before: This initiative is efficient, impactful, and sustainable.
after: This initiative reduces cost by $12M while maintaining service levels.

description: Delete landscape-framing openers — start with the substance
before: As we navigate the current environment, procurement discipline becomes essential.
trigger_regex: (?i)(as we navigate|in today'?s landscape|in the current environment|in the current climate)

before: It is important to highlight that vendor compliance sits at 62%.
trigger_regex: (?i)(it is important to highlight|it bears mentioning|it is worth highlighting)

description: Rewrite antithetical pivot - drop the theatrical rejection, state directly
before: The fix is not to abandon IWF - it is to broaden it.
after: IWF should be broadened across multiple work types.
trigger_regex: (?i)\b(is not to|isn't about|isn't to|is not whether|is not about)\b.{1,60}\b(it is to|it's about|it's to|but)\b

description: Delete declarative reveal framing - state the recommendation directly
before: The path forward is to broaden IWF across work types.
